_note: Optional MCP servers for this repo. Both are commented-in as suggestions — remove the ones you don't want. Secrets MUST NOT be committed: each server reads its token from an environment variable (set it in your shell or MCP client, never inline here). 'github' powers PR/issue workflows (this repo already uses the gh CLI); 'mongodb' gives read access to the MongoDB Atlas 'learnData_db'. Install prerequisites: `npx` (bundled with Node) for the GitHub server; `npm i -g mongodb-mcp-server` (or use npx) for the MongoDB server. Enable in an interactive session with `claude mcp` or /mcp.
